entity.summary: Cardano decentralized exchange protocol with a current first-party application, registered Plutus-script deployment metadata, and current protocol liquidity.
entity.notes: The current first-party application remains reachable. Cardano ecosystem registry data identifies CSWAP DEX, its cswap.fi domain, DEX classification, V1 release, and deployed Plutus scripts. Current DefiLlama protocol data reports substantial Cardano TVL, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: CSWAP DEX official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application remains reachable and preserves the live CSWAP DEX product surface.

evidence.title: CSWAP DEX Cardano ecosystem registry entry
evidence.notes: Registry entry identifies CSWAP DEX, cswap.fi, DEX classification, V1 release metadata, and deployed Cardano Plutus scripts and contract addresses.

evidence.title: CSWAP protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol profile reports Cardano TVL for CSWAP, supporting active classification together with the reachable first-party application.
